mapper.select: { CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_INST_CAPA_LISTBYALL ( #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dtType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dtList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instTypeList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instCtgrList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seatTypeList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instZoneType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instZoneList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weekList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }

{ CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_INST_CAPA_SAVE ( #{saveGubn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{capaId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{capaCtgr ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{capaType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seatType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zoneType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zoneCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weekCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{capaPerDay,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{totCapa ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }

{ CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_INST_CAPA_CRT ( #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dtType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dtList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instCtgr ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seatTypeList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instZoneType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{instZoneList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weekList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{capaCnt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}
) }
